files.Title: Pulumi.Esc.Sdk.EnvironmentDefinitionSerializer
files.Summary: Provides serialization and deserialization for . The ESC API returns environment definitions as application/x-yaml content from the GetEnvironment, GetEnvironmentAtVersion, and DecryptEnvironment endpoints. The generated client cannot deserialize YAML, so this class bridges that gap.
